lineage.Process: Sort ContinentalCounties C:\BACKUP\Longevity\Analysis\Analysis.gdb\Counties "STATE_NAME ASCENDING;FIPS ASCENDING;OBJECTID ASCENDING" "Upper right"
JoinField Counties FIPS USA_Counties FIPS NAME;STATE_FIPS;CNTY_FIPS
JoinField Counties CountyCode CountyAveAgeOfDeath FIRST_County_Code County;AveAgeDeath;SUM_Deaths
JoinField Counties FIPS USA_Counties FIPS NAME
JoinField CountyData STATE_NAME AgeOfDeathByState_Sums State AveAgeDeathState "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField "Average age of death at the National level\CountyData" FIPS CountyDataPop2019 FIPS populationtotals_totpop_cy "Select transfer fields" #
CalculateField "Average age of death at the National level\County Data" ExpLifeSpan2019 78.8 "Python 3" # "Long (large integer)" NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField "Average age of death at the National level\County Data" Exp "Delete Fields"
CalculateField "Average age of death at the National level\County Data" Exp 78.8 "Python 3" # "Float (single precision)" NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CopyFeatures "Average age of death at the National level\County Data" C:\BACKUPLG\Longevity\DataPackage\Data.gdb\CountyData # # # #
CopyFeatures "Average age of death at the National level\County Data" C:\BACKUPLG\Longevity\DataPackage\Data.gdb\CountyData # # # #
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataUnemployment FIPS industry_UNEMPRT_CY "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyHealthRankings2019 FIPS v009_rawvalue;v011_rawvalue;v070_rawvalue;v049_rawvalue "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataEnrich1 FIPS pNoHealthInsurance "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataEnrich2 FIPS crime_CRMCYPERC "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS SuicidesByCounty CountyCode pSuicideDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS DrugDeathsByCounty CountyCode pDrugDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS TrafficDeathsByCounty CountyCode pTrafficDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS InfantDeathsByCounty CountyCode InfantMortalityRate "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataEnrich1 FIPS miscellaneous_X12001_X_A;PsychographicsAdvertising_MP28095a_B_I "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
CalculateField CountyData InfantDeaths !InfantMortalityRate! Python # "Float (32-bit floating point)" NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField CountyData InfantDeaths 0 Python # "Float (32-bit floating point)" NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataIncome FIPS householdincome_MEDHINC_CY "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"

ExportFeatures CountyData C:\BACKUPLG\CausalInference\Tutorial\UnemploymentAndLifeSpan.gdb\tCountyData # NOT_USE_ALIAS "STATE_NAME "State" true true false 35 Text 0 0,First,#,CountyData,STATE_NAME,0,34;CountyCode "CountyCode" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,CountyData,CountyCode,-1,-1;County "County" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,CountyData,County,0,254;FIPS "FIPS" true true false 5 Text 0 0,First,#,CountyData,FIPS,0,4;AveAgeDeath "Ave Age at Death" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,AveAgeDeath,-1,-1;UnemploymentRate "Unemployment Rate" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,UnemploymentRate,-1,-1;householdincome_MEDHINC_CY "2019 Median Household Income" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,householdincome_MEDHINC_CY,-1,-1;pAdultSmoking "Adult smoking (%)" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pAdultSmoking,-1,-1;pAdultObesity "Adult obesity (%)" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pAdultObesity,-1,-1;pNoExercise "Physical inactivity (%)" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pNoExercise,-1,-1;pNoHealthInsurance "% No Health Insurance" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pNoHealthInsurance,-1,-1;idxPersonalCrime "Personal Crime Index" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,idxPersonalCrime,-1,-1;pSuicideDeaths "% Suicide Deaths" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pSuicideDeaths,-1,-1;pDrugDeaths "% Drug Related Deaths" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pDrugDeaths,-1,-1;pTrafficDeaths "% Motor Traffic Deaths" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pTrafficDeaths,-1,-1;InfantDeaths "Infant deaths per 1000" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,InfantDeaths,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataPoverty FIPS households_ACSHHBPOV_P "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"

ExportFeatures CountyData C:\BACKUPLG\CausalInference\Tutorial\UnemploymentAndLifeSpan.gdb\tCountyData # NOT_USE_ALIAS "STATE_NAME "State" true true false 35 Text 0 0,First,#,CountyData,STATE_NAME,0,34;CountyCode "CountyCode" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,CountyData,CountyCode,-1,-1;County "County" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,CountyData,County,0,254;FIPS "FIPS" true true false 5 Text 0 0,First,#,CountyData,FIPS,0,4;AveAgeDeath "Ave Age at Death" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,AveAgeDeath,-1,-1;UnemploymentRate "Unemployment Rate" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,UnemploymentRate,-1,-1;households_ACSHHBPOV_P "ACS HHs: Inc Below Poverty Level : Percent" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,households_ACSHHBPOV_P,-1,-1;pAdultSmoking "Adult smoking (%)" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pAdultSmoking,-1,-1;pAdultObesity "Adult obesity (%)" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pAdultObesity,-1,-1;pNoExercise "Physical inactivity (%)" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pNoExercise,-1,-1;pNoHealthInsurance "% No Health Insurance" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pNoHealthInsurance,-1,-1;idxPersonalCrime "Personal Crime Index" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,idxPersonalCrime,-1,-1;pSuicideDeaths "% Suicide Deaths" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pSuicideDeaths,-1,-1;pDrugDeaths "% Drug Related Deaths" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pDrugDeaths,-1,-1;pTrafficDeaths "% Motor Traffic Deaths" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,pTrafficDeaths,-1,-1;InfantDeaths "Infant deaths per 1000" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,CountyData,InfantDeaths,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,CountyData,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyData_Education FIPS pNoHSDip "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS AlcoholDeathsByCounty CountyCode pAlcohol "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CancerDeathsByCounty CountyCode pCancer "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS HeartDiseaseDeathsByCounty CountyCode pHeartDisease "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS AlcoholDeathsByCounty CountyCode pAlcohol "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS DrugDeathsByCounty CountyCode pDrugDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS SuicidesByCounty CountyCode pSuicideDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CancerDeathsByCounty CountyCode pCancer "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS HeartDiseaseDeathsByCounty CountyCode pHeartDisease "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS TrafficDeathsByCounty CountyCode pTrafficDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS UnintentionalInjuryDeathsByCounty CountyCode pInjury "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"

JoinField "County Data" FIPS CountyHealthRankingsAll2019 FIPS v140_rawvalue;v043_rawvalue;v125_rawvalue "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField "County Data" FIPS CountyData_Enrich FIPS householdincome_MEDHINC_CY "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField "County Data" FIPS tCountyData FIPS pTrafficDeaths "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataMedianIncome FIPS MedHHIncome "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
Near CountyData Maine # NO_LOCATION NO_ANGLE Planar "NEAR_DIST Dst2Maine" "US Survey Miles"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataHealthyDiet FIPS PsychographicsAdvertising_MP28071a_B_P "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataSmokingProducts FIPS miscellaneous_X12001_X_I "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
JoinField CountyData FIPS CountyDataMinorities FIPS raceandhispanicorigin_MINORITYCY_P "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"

JoinField "County Data" FIPS CountyDataMore FIPS PsychographicsAdvertising_MP28092a_B_P;PsychographicsAdvertising_MP28071a_B_P;food_X1060_X_A;restaurants_MP29044a_B_P;food_X2001_X_A;miscellaneous_X12001_X_A;householdincome_MEDHINC_CY "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

dataIdInfo.idAbs: USA States (Generalized) provides boundaries for the States of the United States in the 50 states and the District of Columbia. The linework has been generalized for increased performance and best viewed at smaller scales.Attribute fields include estimated total population, 2010 U.S. Census demographic information, and 2012 Census of Agriculture information for the USA States.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: USA States (Generalized) provides boundaries for the States of the United States in the 50 states and the District of Columbia.
dataIdInfo.idCredit:
CountyData: Esri; U.S. Department of Commerce, Census Bureau; U.S. Department of Commerce (DOC), National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA), National Ocean Service (NOS), National Geodetic Survey (NGS)
Additional attribute values appended to spatial data: - ArcGIS Pro Enrich Tool. Esri - The average age at death, and cause of death data (suicide, drug, and alcohol deaths per 100,000 people) are for years 1999 to 2019 and were obtained from CDC Wonder. The Underlying Cause of Death data are produced by the Mortality Statistics Branch, Division of Vital Statistics, National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS), Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), United States Department of Health and Human Services (US DHHS). See Data Source Information. - The smoking, obesity, physical inactivity, social capital, and air pollution data are from the 2019 County Health Rankings, available from the ArcGIS Living Atlas of the World. University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute, Robert Wood Johnson Foundation.

Consts.useLimit: This data is covered by the Esri Master License.Use of this Data is restricted to training, demonstration, and educational purposes only. This Data cannot be sold or used for marketing without the express written consent of Environmental Systems Research Institute Inc. THE DATA AND RELATED MATERIALS MAY CONTAIN SOME NONCONFORMITIES, DEFECTS, OR ERRORS. ESRI DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE DATA WILL MEET USER'S NEEDS OR EXPECTATIONS; THAT THE USE OF THE DATA WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED; OR THAT ALL NONCONFORMITIES, DEFECTS, OR ERRORS CAN OR WILL BE CORRECTED. ESRI IS NOT INVITING RELIANCE ON THIS DATA, AND THE USER SHOULD ALWAYS VERIFY ACTUAL DATA. THE DATA AND RELATED MATERIALS ARE PROVIDED "AS-IS," WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. IN NO EVENT SHALL ESRI AND/OR ITS LICENSOR(S) BE LIABLE FOR COSTS OF PROCUREMENT OF SUBSTITUTE GOODS OR SERVICES; LOST PROFITS, LOST SALES, OR BUSINESS EXPENDITURES, INVESTMENTS, OR COMMITMENTS IN CONNECTION WITH ANY BUSINESS; LOSS OF ANY GOODWILL; OR FOR ANY INDIRECT, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF THIS AGREEMENT OR USE OF THE DATA AND RELATED MATERIALS, HOWEVER CAUSED, ON ANY THEORY OF LIABILITY, AND WHETHER OR NOT ESRI OR ITS LICENSOR(S) HAVE BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. THESE LIMITATIONS SHALL APPLY NOTWITHSTANDING ANY FAILURE OF ESSENTIAL PURPOSE OF ANY EXCLUSIVE REMEDY. In the event that the data vendor(s) has (have) granted the end user permission to redistribute the Geodata, please use proper proprietary or copyright attribution for the various data vendor(s), and provide the associated metadata file(s) with the Geodata.Data ContactTraining Services Librarian, Esri | 380 New York Street | Redlands, CA 92373 | USA DataLibrary@esri.com | esri.com
